name: atlas-blob-compute-smoke-materials
description: E5 Phase 7e+ — materials port. enableMaterials=true makes hit pixels look up per-atom diffuse colors via sceneSDF_material_unified instead of the hardcoded 0.7 gray albedo. Compile-time gated like D5/D2 (heavy feature, +1 sceneSDF-equivalent per hit pixel ~145ms estimated). Pipeline rebuilds with MATERIALS_ENABLED=1. Set tileCount=2 for the per-tile budget headroom that the extra per-hit cost needs. Lighting must also be ON (materials only matter inside the FEAT_LIGHTING branch).
